top_signals.title: Decisions taken by the Governing Council of the ECB (in addition to decisions setting interest rates)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China’s Huawei reveals chip design breakthrough amid U.S. sanctions
top_signals.summary: China is seen as unlikely to reach Huawei's target through conventional manufacturing alone because of restricted access to advanced lithography tools and other technologies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
